events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, risk **critical**.

Key issue: hot work is proceeding over an open sewer/drain without evidence the opening was covered/sealed or the drain atmosphere tested for flammable vapors first — a sequence violation since NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J require those precautions (plus fire watch) to be completed *before* ignition sources are used, since sewer systems can carry combustible gases far from the visible work point. Recommended action: stop hot work, cover the drain, test atmosphere, confirm permit conditions, then post fire watch before resuming.
